ops.title: XRPC surface + CLI completion (approved plan in flight)
ops.description: Executing the approved plan at /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-08/plans/we-want-to-expose-ancient-raven.md: cc-interact v0.8.0 `Server.Dispatch` export, one method registry driving socket/XRPC/MCP/CLI, `/xrpc/<method>` + `cco.server.describe` catalog, fleet-subject SSE streaming, capture/respawn/sprint-kill ops, full CLI (`--json`, show verbs, fleet group), docs + release. Consumer: cc-pane (TypeScript OpenTUI). Phase ordering note: Phase 3 (fleet) runs after Phases 2∥4 because its emit call sites land in handlers Phase 4 creates.

ops.text: curl catalog/query/procedure/capture/error shapes pass against a live daemon (plan Verification #2)
fleet SSE stream + Last-Event-ID resume verified (plan Verification #3)
CLI matrix incl. --json/jq, MCP tools/list parity, spawn-smoke green (plan Verification #4-6)
